nodes.name: Tenggara paradise flycatcher
nodes.summary: Tenggara paradise flycatcher (Terpsiphone floris) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is native to Sumbawa, Alor, Lomblen and Flores islands in the Lesser Sundas. Formerly, it was considered a subspecies of the Blyth's paradise flycatcher until elevated to species rank by the IOC in 2021. References
